name: 讀心術懸念鉤子
description: 女主的內心獨白被丈夫聽見，形成資訊不對稱的喜劇張力。觀眾知道女主在想什麼，丈夫也知道，但女主不知道丈夫知道，三重視角製造持續的懸念和笑點。

examples.drama_title: Witch transmigrated to ugly wife, fam hears her inner voice! rise all the way, become CEO's fave!
examples.excerpt: Her mouth didn't move. So why can I hear her voice? Could it be this is her inner thoughts? Scared shitless. How is that possible?
